title: jacobaea cannabifolia
intro: Jacobaea cannabifolia, also known as False Hemp or Jacobaea, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Jacobaea cannabifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
